candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line, but nothing indicates it is specifically tied to Cost of goods sold; selected COGS row is the explicit total and absent a COGS-specific D&A breakout, D&A is assumed embedded in COGS rather than separately addable to the COGS bucket.
This is a same-level operating D&A summary, but it is not labelled as COGS-specific and also includes impairment, so it should not be added to COGS_DA.

variables.notes: No explicit depreciation/amortisation row is identified as belonging to cost of goods sold/cost of revenues. The selected parent row is the explicit 'Cost of goods sold' total, so the conservative view is that any production-related D&A is already embedded there and should not be added separately.

candidates.why: Pure D&A component shown as a separate operating row outside the selected XSGA component rows; appears addable to the overhead bucket.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Separate operating depreciation row at the same level as other operating expenses; not embedded in selected staff/other external/R&D/share-based rows and should be added separately to XSGA_DA.

candidates.row_label: Amortization and impairment excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Although this is separate operating D&A, it is explicitly in R&D and also mixes amortization with impairment. Since 'Research and Development' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, this R&D-specific row should not be added separately here.
R&D/development-related amortization, and the dedicated R&D row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD; do not add separately.
Separate amortization row outside the selected XSGA component rows; appears to be non-R&D operating amortization and should be added separately.
Residual D&A component needed to reconcile the operating D&A breakdown; separate from selected XSGA component rows, so include to avoid understating separate D&A.
Residual D&A component in the operating section that reconciles the D&A breakdown; separate from selected XSGA component rows, so include.
Useful summary row, but it includes impairment, which is out of scope for this task, so prefer pure D&A component rows instead.

variables.notes: MANUALLY Changed. The operating statement shows D&A as separate same-level lines outside the selected XSGA component rows, so they should be added separately. The headline summary row is not used because it includes impairment. R&D-specific amortization is excluded because 'Research and Development' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, and adding R&D D&A separately would risk distortion/double counting.
